claims.quote: Clerkships are four weeks in length with clinical learning experiences that are structured to allow for institutional academic elective credit to be assigned if desired.
claims.claimText: Orlando Health offers four-week clerkships with optional academic elective credit.
claims.limitations: Page covers Orlando Health system clerkships; not exclusive to ORMC campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is a visiting medical student clerkship program with VSLO pathway — Tier 1 USCE despite URL being under /graduate-medical-education/.

claims.quote: US medical students who have access to VSLO (Visiting Student Learning Opportunities) must complete the medical student application on VSLO, as provided by the AAMC.
claims.claimText: US medical students with VSLO access apply via AAMC VSLO.
claims.limitations: Source declared DEPARTMENT_LEVEL but content is system-wide.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Explicit VSLO application pathway for visiting medical students = Tier 1.

claims.quote: US medical students who do not have access to VSLO may submit a paper application. Please reach out to the GME office via email at [email protected] to request the application.
claims.claimText: Paper application available via email to GME office for non-VSLO US students.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Alternative paper-application pathway for visiting medical students.

claims.quote: Please note that only students enrolled at U.S. LCME accredited institutions and accredited American Osteopathic Association institutions are able to apply via VSLO. Students enrolled at LCME accredited Canadian institutions or international medical schools may find application materials as noted below.
claims.claimText: VSLO restricted to US LCME / AOA; Canadian LCME and international students use other materials.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility specifics for visiting medical student application.

claims.quote: Orlando Health will charge an application/processing fee of $50.00 per approved rotation.
claims.claimText: $50.00 application/processing fee per approved rotation.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Cost statement for visiting student rotation.

claims.quote: The application must include a copy of the CV, transcripts, school’s medical malpractice insurance ($1,000,000 occurrence / $3,000,000 annual aggregate) and a copy of current personal health insurance.
claims.claimText: Required: CV, transcripts, school malpractice ($1M/$3M), personal health insurance.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Document and malpractice requirements for visiting students.

claims.quote: Foreign medical students must complete the same requirements as the US medical students. In addition, they must also include the CIE 701/702 form with their application.
claims.claimText: Foreign medical students must also submit CIE 701/702 form in addition to US requirements.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Explicit pathway for international medical students.

claims.quote: If your school holds the CIE 702 Form you are required to have Step 1 and Step 2 completed before the start of the rotation.
claims.claimText: If school holds CIE 702, USMLE Step 1 and Step 2 must be completed before rotation start.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: USMLE Step eligibility requirement for foreign medical students.

claims.quote: Elective rotations are scheduled for a duration of four weeks.
claims.claimText: Elective rotations are 4 weeks long.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Duration statement for visiting student elective.

claims.quote: If approved, you can complete a total of two rotations within the Orlando Health system.
claims.claimText: Maximum of two rotations per student within Orlando Health system.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Cap on number of visiting student rotations.

claims.quote: Fourth-year medical students wishing to apply for a clerkship position and who do not have access to VSLO will need to contact the GME office via email to request a paper application.
claims.claimText: Fourth-year medical students target audience for clerkship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Year-of-training audience specification.

claims.quote: Various clerkships are offered in the areas of:Emergency MedicineGeneral SurgeryInternal MedicineNeurologyObstetrics and GynecologyOrthopedic SurgeryPathologyPediatrics
claims.claimText: Clerkship specialties: EM, General Surgery, IM, Neurology, OB/GYN, Ortho, Pathology, Pediatrics.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Specialty list for clerkship offerings.
